series_metadata.series_description: Files contain the application, signed agreement letter, check receipt letter, and paid invoices. Also, may include copies of audits performed.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain hard copy of fire department files for three (3) years. Retain grant applications for fire departments not awarded a grant for two (2) years. ; Electronic: Computer database must be retained for three years then saved to disk until record series is no longer created then destroy by erasure., Paper: Recycle ; Electronic: Erase
